geographic_restrictions: Western and Southeastern regions of Massachusetts
project_area: Afterschool and out-of-school time (ASOST) programs, including summer programs
demographic_requirements: Programs must enhance access for students who have previously been underserved
eligibility_summary: Eligible applicants include nonprofits, schools, and community-based organizations in Western and Southeastern Massachusetts. Boys and Girls Clubs and YMCAs are not eligible. Funds cannot be used for capital projects.
